correctament.sentence: La paraula "mateix" és molt difícil de pronunciar correctament.
correctament.english: The word "same" is very difficult to pronounce correctly.

alliberar.sentence: On vol anar la humanitat, si no pot alliberar-se del ressentiment i del mal?
alliberar.english: Where does humanity want to go, if it cannot free itself from resentment and evil?

oxigen.sentence: El gas oxigen diatòmic constitueix el 20,9% del volum de l'atmosfera de la Terra.
oxigen.english: Diatomic oxygen gas constitutes 20.9% of the volume of the Earth's atmosphere.

cinquè.sentence: Al cinquè dia, l'ànec seguia viu.
cinquè.english: On the fifth day, the duck was still alive.

lligat.sentence: Conjunt lligat: quan un conjunt és linealment dependent.
lligat.english: Linked set: when a set is linearly dependent.

menú.sentence: L'estat de les descàrregues es pot comprovar al menú HOME en el "Download Manager".
menú.english: The status of the downloads can be checked in the HOME menu in the "Download Manager".

cavaller.sentence: Ell es vesteix com un cavaller però parla i actúa com un paiaso.
cavaller.english: His dress is that of a gentleman, but his speech and behavior are those of a clown.

cobert.sentence: En qüestió de segons, tot va quedar cobert de fum.
cobert.english: In a matter of seconds, everything was covered in smoke.

juntament.sentence: Juntament amb Bèlgica i els Països Baixos constitueix el Benelux.
juntament.english: Together with Belgium and the Netherlands it constitutes the Benelux.

ratolí.sentence: Per al gat l'opinió del ratolí no comptava.
ratolí.english: The cat couldn't care less about the mouse's opinion.

recull.sentence: Tatoeba és important per a l'estudi de les llengües estrangeres en general. És un recull de frases sobre tot. Té un corpus immens i inigualable.
recull.english: Tatoeba is important for the study of foreign languages ​​in general. It's a collection of sentences about everything. It has a huge, unparalleled corpus.

rere.sentence: Llavors, el segon ciclista, i el tercer rere d'ell, recorre la segona volta.
rere.english: Then the second cyclist, and the third after him, complete the second lap.
